title: ヒシアマ姐さんの裁縫テク

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm out buying a few things at the shopping
district when I run into Hishi Amazon with another
Miho dorm student by chance.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hey, what a coincidence! You out shoppin' too,
Teach?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
We just finished checkin' out that craft store over
there.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I've got the handiest hands around,
don'tcha know? I do a lot of needlework and
cooking.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Our clothes constantly get torn or frayed with all
the running we do!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
One of the Miho students needed a quick fix, so
we zipped over to use the store's rental sewing
machine.

text_block_list.name: Miho Student A
text_block_list.text:
You really saved me, Hishiama! I didn't know what
to do when my uniform ripped.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
It was nothing! Just promise me you'll rest up
good and let your injury heal!

text_block_list.name: Miho Student A
text_block_list.text:
I will! Thank you so much! I'm going to head back,
so I'll see you later!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Yep! See you later!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I know livin' on your own can be tough, so if you
ever need any help, just lemme know, Teach!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just as I'm marveling at how caring Hishi Amazon
is, I notice all the bags she's carrying. Seems she's
done a bit of personal shopping too.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! The store just stocked up on lots of new
items, so I ended up grabbing a bunch of stuff!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
My hobbies end up being pretty practical since I
can mend clothes and make little handicraft
accessories.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hm? Hang on...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Uh-oh! The hem of your jacket's coming apart!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Man, what a mess. You're lucky I was the one to
catch it!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hand it over! I'll mend it up for you in the blink of
an eye!
choice_data_list:
It's okay! I can do it myself, even if it takes a
while.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hand it over! I'll mend it up for you in the blink of
an eye!
choice_data_list:
It's okay! I can do it myself, even if it takes a
while.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Haha, no worries! Let's go to the park and find us
a bench!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I won't take but a second of your time!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon takes out her sewing kit and makes
light work of the frayed hem.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: And that's that! Go on then, try it on!
choice_data_list: Thank you, it looks brand new.
Thank you, it looks brand new.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Heh, that was light work!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I found a hole in it mid-stitching, so I went ahead
and fixed that up too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I take a glance at my jacket and find a
leopard-print patch covering the hole in
question...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: It gives your jacket a bit of flair, don'tcha think?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and don't worry about payin' me back! It's no
biggie!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since she went out of her way to add this little
touch, I feel extra motivated to take good care of
my jacket.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
You sure? Oh yeah, you're an adult! I'm glad
you've got things under control.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Still, your jacket is startin' to look real shabby.
It'd be better to fix it up quickly.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Here, you can borrow my sewing kit—I always
carry it with me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon lends me her sewing kit. I take a
seat on a park bench and start fixing up my
jacket's hem, but...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Did you prick yourself with the needle?!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
No worries?! We need to take care of it now!
Hang on, I always keep some bandages on me
too!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: All right, this should do it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't help but notice the cute cat design on the
bandage she puts on my finger.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! This is sure to keep you from being reckless
with that needle.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
The younger students love these. The same goes
for the cute lunches I make!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: You gotta be careful and stay safe, okay, Teach?
